[event]
# Barrel
type=event
location=18,12,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1,2
mapmod=object,18,12,288
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Barrel

[event]
# Crate
type=event
location=8,14,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1
mapmod=object,8,14,286
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Crate

[event]
# Brazier sound effect
type=event
location=12,15,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/open_fire_loop.ogg

[enemy]
type=enemy
location=8,8,12,12
category=il_common
number=4,6
spawn_level=hero_level,1
